message:
test(runtime): add 41 unit tests for render_trace.rs (bd-2sgpy)

Comprehensive coverage for the render-trace JSONL recorder:
- FNV-1a hash functions (determinism, byte/u16/u32 equivalence, empty input, long input)
- JSON helpers (escape special chars/controls, opt_u64/usize/f64/str)
- Config builder chain and defaults
- Recorder: disabled returns None, finish idempotence, multi-frame index
- Checksum: determinism, differing content/dimensions
- Payload: kind strings, full-buffer format, write creates file
- JSONL serialization: header, frame, summary, env, capabilities, policies
- Null optional fields in frame/summary/policies

Total: 43 render_trace tests (2 existing + 41 new)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
